title: pyrrosia sarthalensis
intro: Pyrrosia sarthalensis, also known as the Himalayan leather fern or Himalayan polypody, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It is native to the Himalayan region and is used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Pyrrosia sarthalensis is often made into teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
